Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Brian McMahon
Message:
Remove Alpha Engine-specific code from generic package

Delete diagnosis/alpha_engine.py (AE system prompt, S3 health checks,
Step Function context) and ALPHA_ENGINE_PLAYBOOK from playbook.py.
Default Playbook to empty patterns list. Fix tests to supply their
own playbook patterns instead of relying on baked-in AE patterns.
Clean hardcoded repo references from smoke_test.py.

flow-doctor is now fully generic with no application-specific code.
